title: ericameria nauseosa var. nana
intro: Ericameria nauseosa var. nana, also known as Dwarf Rubber Rabbitbrush, is a small shrub native to the western United States and Canada, belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Ericameria nauseosa var. nana include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
